nasb.text: but during the seventh year the land shall have a sabbath rest, a sabbath to the Lord; you shall not sow your field nor prune your vineyard.

esv.text: but in the seventh year there shall be a Sabbath of solemn rest for the land, a Sabbath to the Lord. You shall not sow your field or prune your vineyard.

cnv.text: 但是第七年，地要完全休歇，享受耶和華的安息；你不可耕種田地，也不可修剪葡萄園。

ccb.text: 但第七年是安息年，土地要休息，以尊崇耶和华。你们不可耕种，不可修整葡萄园。
